all_gems.doc_excerpt: Scorer architecture exploitation for task-aware compression (Tricks 13-14).
blockers: Strict-scorer rule: nothing at inflate time
Compress-time only
all_gems.rationale: Documented scorer-blind-spot exploits — apply at TTO compress time.

all_gems.sketch: Lane Ω-W-V2 (40.98% bytes saved on Lane G v3)
all_gems.doc_excerpt: Lane Ω-W-V2 — water-fill + arithmetic terminal on Selfcomp/block-FP weights.
blockers: Requires β-Fisher sensitivity map for PR106 HNeRV decoder
GPU $0 cap — sensitivity map needs forward pass
all_gems.evidence_path: Lane Ω-W-V2 40.98% bytes [empirical] on Lane G v3 renderer.bin
all_gems.rationale: Per-parameter bit allocation by score-Jacobian magnitude. 40.98% byte saving was on a 88K-param renderer; HNeRV decoder may be larger but principle generalizes.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Score-sensitivity map contract for β / Ω-W-V3.
blockers: Producer artifact for PR106 needs HNeRV decoder forward
all_gems.rationale: Foundational producer for water-fill / sjkl / IMP downstream. Itself doesn't score.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Selfcomp grayscale-LUT mask codec — lane MM rate-attack primitive.
blockers: LUT requires class-target derivation specific to PR106 HNeRV decoder output
all_gems.rationale: Replace neural mask channel with shared latent + Gaussian-softmax-LUT (σ=15). Selfcomp 0.36 used this path. Could compose with PR106 decoder for ~150KB archive.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Lane SH — Shannon-optimal arithmetic coding for SegMap qint streams.
blockers: PR106 already uses brotli — arithmetic gain is marginal unless context model is better
all_gems.rationale: Arithmetic coder for quantized integer streams. PR106 latents (15849 bytes brotli) at entropy 7.985/8 — near saturated. Decoder weights similarly. Marginal.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: QZS3 weight codec for Quantizr-faithful JointFrameGenerator models.
blockers: Need HNeRV decoder weight extraction script
QZS3 expects FP4-quantized renderer state-dict shape — HNeRV decoder shape differs
all_gems.rationale: Replace PR106's brotli-packed decoder (170KB) with grouped variable-bit-depth FP4 + arithmetic. Shannon-entropy floor on dense decoder weights ~ -3 to -10KB if decoder is FP32, less if already FP16.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Lane C: UNIWARD δ-injection on rendered frames at compress-time.
blockers: UNIWARD attestation gate must be passed before deploy
all_gems.rationale: Detector-informed embedding — Fridrich's textured-region undetectable error placement. Apply to PR106's mask channel for SegNet error masking.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Block-floating-point ternary codec for Lane SZ (szabolcs paradigm).
blockers: Block-FP is per-tensor — must adapt per-channel for HNeRV decoder
all_gems.rationale: Replace PR106 decoder packing with block-FP. Selfcomp's 1.017 bpw effective matches Quantizr's FP4 — could shave ~5-15KB on a 170KB decoder.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: QP1 pose codec — PR #67 EthanYang qpose14_qzs3 byte-identical.
blockers: PR106 baseline does not currently use a pose sidecar; need adapter to inject pose-delta as charged sidecar inside HNeRV archive
all_gems.rationale: Already shipped in C-067 lineage. PR106 pose contribution 0.018306 — sidecar + arithmetic-coded pose delta could shave ~0.001-0.003 if PR106 pose was bottlenecked. Risk: PR106's pose may already be near floor.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Lane SCNN — Self-Compressing Neural Networks (Wang et al. arXiv:2301.13142).
blockers: Self-compressing NN training is multi-hour CUDA
all_gems.rationale: Schmidhuber self-compression — train HNeRV decoder to compress itself recursively.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Deterministic rank-1 pose compression via a tiny polynomial model.
blockers: GP fit may not match PR106's pose representation
all_gems.rationale: Bayesian pose fit — could replace PR106 pose path with low-rank GP encoded poses.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Score-Jacobian Karhunen-Loève (SJ-KL) basis primitive.
blockers: Requires score-Jacobian computation against HNeRV decoder
PR98 HNeRV-adapter integration as residual basis
all_gems.rationale: Score-Jacobian Karhunen-Loève basis as task-aware residual primitive — Shannon-floor-optimal under known scorer. Stack potential predicted 0.180.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Lane 12 — NeRV / Cool-Chic mask codec (van den Oord + Mallat lead).
blockers: NeRV training requires ~5-10h GPU
all_gems.rationale: NeRV implicit neural representation for mask channel. 23.6KB / 94.4% byte savings empirical [Lane 12 Phase G]. Stack with PR106 HNeRV decoder for combined neural codec.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: RAFT-derived pose-dim0 estimation for compress-time lane experiments.
blockers: RAFT requires CUDA forward (we capped GPU $0)
Already explored Lane GP — pose GP fit
all_gems.rationale: Replace PR106's pose pathway with RAFT optical-flow-derived ego-motion. PR106 pose contribution 0.018306; RAFT-derived pose at training time is industry-standard openpilot path.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Lane SI: Saliency-Inversion compression weighting.
blockers: Inversion needs scorer forward at compress time
all_gems.rationale: Invert saliency map — encode where scorer is INSENSITIVE (Fridrich principle).

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Lane Joint-ADMM proximal wrapper for water_filling_codec_v2 (Lane Ω-W-V2).
blockers: ADMM + water-fill needs sensitivity map for PR106
all_gems.rationale: Joint-ADMM water-fill proximal — feeds into ADMM coordinator.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Lane Wavelet — Daubechies/Haar wavelet-domain mask codec (Mallat lineage).
blockers: Wavelet codec needs pose-aware atomic decomposition
all_gems.rationale: Mallat-style wavelet basis for mask coding — sparse coefficients + arithmetic coding. Could replace AV1 path entirely if entropy is lower.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Lane MDL/Bayesian — meta codec-comparison framework (MacKay).
blockers: MDL Bayesian codec needs training
all_gems.rationale: MacKay MDL Bayesian — variational coder with Bayesian prior on weights. Strong theoretical foundation, untested on our scale.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Lane 20 — Production Ballé hyperprior codec for qint streams.
blockers: Hyperprior training is non-trivial; needs CUDA
all_gems.rationale: Replace fixed factorized priors with Ballé 2018 scale hyperprior. Standard rate prediction net for residual bits.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Lane 20 β-variant — sensitivity-conditioned Ballé hyperprior σ prediction.
blockers: Hyperprior + sensitivity composition needs prototype
all_gems.rationale: Sensitivity-weighted hyperprior — entropy bottleneck with task-aware bit allocation.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Lane Joint-ADMM — Boyd-style coordinator across codec slots (Phase 2 Lane 10).
blockers: Joint-ADMM proximals defined for our codec components; need HNeRV decoder proximal
all_gems.rationale: Boyd ADMM coordinator splits archive-byte constraint across pose/seg/decoder. HNeRV PR106 hasn't run through this — could find Pareto-optimal allocation.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Lane J-IMP — Iterative Magnitude Pruning (LTH stabilized).
blockers: Already wired (Lane 17 IMP)
all_gems.rationale: IMP for HNeRV decoder. PR106 decoder may be amenable.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Lane Ω-W-V3 — sensitivity-weighted renderer archive.
blockers: OWv3 path is for renderer.bin, not HNeRV decoder layout
all_gems.rationale: OWv3 sensitivity-weighted bit allocation — already best-in-class for our renderer.bin shape.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Lane STC — boundary-focused mask-class codec (Stage 2 implementation).
blockers: Filler STC requires syndrome trellis — needs design verification
all_gems.rationale: Syndrome-trellis boundary codec — Filler's optimal embedding for binary masks under distortion budget.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Unified trick stacking engine for inflate-time optimizations.
blockers: Trick stack is a meta-tool
all_gems.rationale: Stack of small score-improvement tricks. Marginal but composable.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Entropy bottleneck rate model for renderer training.
blockers: Bottleneck integration with HNeRV decoder
all_gems.rationale: Ballé 2018 entropy bottleneck. Standard neural compression primitive.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: PARADIGM-γ — Joint Codec Stack Pipeline (JCSP) orchestrator.
blockers: Orchestrator integration with PR106 archive layout
all_gems.rationale: Coordinator — meta-tool that runs other codecs. Useful infrastructure but no direct score gain.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Phase 4 final integration — Optimal Stack Orchestrator.
blockers: Same as joint orchestrator
all_gems.rationale: Like joint stack but optimized — meta-tool, no direct score gain.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Depth-aware motion predictor: geometric parallax flow from per-class depth + 6-DOF camera.
blockers: Depth+motion needs CUDA training
all_gems.rationale: openpilot-style depth + ego-motion as pose substitute. Strong prior for static-camera 0.mkv.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Temporal delta renderer — frame[t] as frame[t-1] + delta[t] (Trick 15).
blockers: Delta encoding adds runtime; needs verification with PR106 decoder
all_gems.rationale: Encode pair2 = pair1 + delta. Saves bytes if frame pairs are correlated.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Variable-rate per-frame mask encoding with difficulty-based CRF allocation.
blockers: Variable rate needs Lagrangian sweep
all_gems.rationale: Per-region variable bit rate — high rate for score-sensitive regions.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Lane LM-V2 — endpoint-tracking zero-archive-cost pose conditioning.
blockers: Lane-mark pose only works on lane-marked frames; contest video is dashcam
all_gems.rationale: Lane-mark constrained pose. Marginal because contest video may not have visible markings consistently.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Invertible Telescope-style hyperbolic foveation.
blockers: Foveation training is non-trivial
all_gems.rationale: Foveal mask weighting — focus encoding budget on score-relevant regions.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Multi-model inflation: dispatch different postfilters to different frames (Eureka 4).
blockers: Need multi-model archive layout
all_gems.rationale: Inflate multiple model variants and pick best per pair. Adds runtime complexity.

all_gems.doc_excerpt:
Lane CG: calibrated camera geometry helpers (EON intrinsics, ray-casting,
homography → SE(3) decomposition).
blockers: Camera calibration may not match contest video
all_gems.rationale: Calibrated camera geometry as prior for pose derivation.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Lane 8 — Multi-pass compress-time optimizer over the canonical archive pipeline.
blockers: Multipass with 30-min cap is tight
all_gems.rationale: Multi-pass refinement at compress time — try N codec configurations, pick best.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Lane 17 IMP β-variant — sensitivity-weighted iterative magnitude pruning.
blockers: IMP needs PR106 finetune cycle
all_gems.rationale: IMP weighted by sensitivity. Small marginal gain on already-pruned HNeRV decoder.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Daubechies-8 (db4) wavelet residual energy for UNIWARD variance maps.
blockers: Wavelet variance needs sensitivity-aware adaptation
all_gems.rationale: Mallat wavelet variance for mask sparse coding. Useful primitive.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Fail-closed local PR86 HPAC replay and byte-parity helpers.
blockers: HPAC alone scored worse than PR106; combination unclear
all_gems.rationale: HPAC hybrid coder. Unproven for PR106 stack.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Local fail-closed PR91 HPM1 mask replay and re-encode helpers.
blockers: HPM1 alone unverified; minimal docs
all_gems.rationale: HPAC hybrid M1 variant. Unproven for PR106 stack.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Lane DI: compress-time openpilot supercombo feature extraction.
blockers: Feature extraction needs comma model
all_gems.rationale: Use openpilot-pretrained features as low-rank conditioning for HNeRV decoder.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Cross-frame attention for temporal coherence in neural renderers (Trick 20).
blockers: Cross-frame attention adds inflate time
all_gems.rationale: Attention across pair frames for HNeRV-style decoder conditioning.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Prototype QBF1 block-FP container for JointFrameGenerator state dicts.
QH0/QM0 renderer codec for PR85-style JointFrameGenerator payloads.
Lane PFP16 — Pose Float-16 cast codec (Lane GP v4 Hotz-option successor).
Lane 20 — Ballé 2018 hyperprior + entropy bottleneck for renderer.bin.
PARADIGM-γ Module γ — Arithmetic terminal layer (canonical).
Lane Ω-W — Water-filling Lagrangian bit-budget allocator.
Lane Joint-ADMM proximal wrapper for pose_delta_codec (Lane PD).
Lane RAFT/radial pose — full 6-DoF radial-basis decomposition of optical flow.
Lane PD — Pose-delta encoder/decoder (Schmidhuber eureka, 2026-04-29).
Lane PD-V2 — Arithmetic-coded pose-delta encoder/decoder (2026-04-29).
Lane M-V3: PoseNet-embedding-space pose distillation (Path A).
Lane GE: compact one-dimensional geodesic pose compression.
Lane LR — Low-Rank pose adaptation for compress-time pose-space TTO.
Lane LR-V2 — LEARNABLE-rank pose adaptation.
Riemannian SGD on SE(3) for Lane RM pose TTO.
SE(3) Lie group operations for Riemannian pose optimization (Lane RM).
Network-IS-the-codec: a tiny neural network whose weights ARE the compressed video.
Lane J-NWC: Neural Weight Compression for renderer.bin.
Lane J-NWCS: Sensitivity-aware Neural Weight Compression.
Deterministic corpus manifests for Lane J-NWC codec training.
Lane VQ-VAE — Discrete codebook mask codec (van den Oord lineage).
Mask extraction, encoding, and decoding for the GPU-lane submission.
Custom entropy coder for 5-class segmentation masks.
Mask class-frequency prior (Lane MOS).
Standalone decoder for PR90 ``STBM1BR`` semantic topband mask segments.
Explicit Rust bridge for STBM1BR semantic mask decode.
Selfcomp ``SegMap`` renderer (mask -> RGB) + matching trainer.
Lane FC — SegMap + FiLM-Canvas hybrid renderer.
SZv1 archive packer / unpacker for the szabolcs no-masks paradigm.
blockers: Selfcomp 0.36 worse than PR106 0.21
all_gems.rationale: Selfcomp full archive. Worse than current frontier — Gaussian-LUT trick still composable separately.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Lane Q-FAITHFUL: 1:1 reverse-engineering of Quantizr PR #55 architecture.
blockers: Quantizr 0.33 worse than PR106 0.21 — but recipe portable
all_gems.rationale: Quantizr faithful 88K-DSConv. Score worse than PR106 directly but FiLM/DSConv components could be extracted as a small decoder for sidecar.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: QFAI export/load helpers for Lane Q-FAITHFUL JointFrameGenerator checkpoints.
PR82/Henosis atom-transfer helpers.
blockers: henosis frontier 0.30 superseded by PR106 0.21
all_gems.rationale: Henosis transfer. Worse than current frontier.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Canonical parser/serializer for PR85 single-member ``x`` bundles.
blockers: PR85 frontier (0.258) superseded by PR106 (0.209)
all_gems.rationale: PR85 transfer codec. Score worse than current frontier by 0.05 — not stackable.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Static intake and byte diffing for public frontier archives.
Fridrich steganalysis-inspired optimization for task-aware compression.
Fridrich-inspired loss terms for inverse steganalysis.
Lane SI-V3: UNIWARD-style texture probability masks.
Scorer-gradient saliency computation (PoseNet/SegNet gradient maps).
Lane 19 β-variant — sensitivity-weighted SegNet logit-margin loss.
Self-compressing postfilter with learnable per-channel bit-depth.
Cross-lane composition glue (per ``docs/stacking_architecture.md``).
Parallel chunked inference for CPU inflate (Eureka 5).
blockers: Pure runtime infra, no score gain
all_gems.rationale: Speed up inflate to fit 30-min cap. PR106 already at 22.6s — comfortable.

all_gems.doc_excerpt: Entropy-coded archive with learned probability models.
Lane OS-A: openpilot supercombo seeding for pose TTO.
Lane-marking-derived per-pair zoom scalar (Hotz analytical, zero archive cost).
Scorer-loss convergence detector for SAGA-style auto warm-up.
Lane C δ compliance attestation utilities (Codex R5-2 #4 fix, 2026-04-27).
blockers: Compliance gate, not score primitive
all_gems.rationale: Compliance enforcement, not optimization. Required for shipping.
